user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new training cost approver, so that training expenses within a cost range and location are routed to the right approver
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Training Cost Approvers screen; When I click Add new cost approver and provide name, cost range, location(s) and approver(s); Then the cost approver rule is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view cost approvers with their cost range, locations and approvers, so that I can verify approval routing coverage
acceptance_criteria: Given cost approver rules exist; When I open the Training Cost Approvers screen; Then I see each rule's Name, Cost range, Location(s) and Cost approver(s)

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing cost approver rule, so that I can adjust ranges, locations or approvers as the organization changes
acceptance_criteria: Given a cost approver rule is listed; When I click Edit and update its details; Then the changes are saved and shown in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the cost approvers list, so that I see the latest approval rules
acceptance_criteria: Given rules have been added or edited; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current records

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to proceed to the next step with Next, so that I can continue the learning management configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given I have finished configuring cost approvers; When I click Next; Then I move to the next configuration step
